attestation.statement: Clinician (clinical sign-off authority) confirmed having clinically reviewed all 51 AUC answer keys in this batch and attests them clinically correct, and authorised ingest.
attestation.recorded_by: claude-opus-4-8 (agent, on clinician's explicit written confirmation in-session)
attestation.scope: all AUC casebundles in this batch (n=51)

transform_flags: Age inferred as ~24 (young menstruating adult) — demographics.age is a required integer; please confirm on clinician review.
Sex inferred as female from menstruation and tampon use in the source note.
Geographic context (RA1_major_city), living situation, health literacy and roommate-as-NOK inferred for encounter realism — confirm on review.
Provisional case_id SPEC-EMG-03-00050 — SEQ derived from source AUC-050; maintainer/ingest --reseq to confirm or reassign within the SPEC-EMG-03 bucket.
Specialty classified EMG primary (with ID and OBGYN tags); a reviewer may prefer ID or OBGYN as primary — case_metadata.specialty_tags is authoritative, not the id.
Difficulty classified red_herring_laden: the patient's 'sunburn' framing of the rash is the intended anchoring trap.

Telehealth reprojection applied: clinician-measured shock vitals (BP 80/45, HR 135, RR 24, SpO2 95%), GCS 13, mucosal exam findings and hospital cultures/bloods are sealed in 10/11 with telehealth_limits; patient/carer-obtainable data (home thermometer fever, video-visible rash, caregiver reports of red eyes/mouth and confusion) placed in 01.objective_data_offered, verified:false.

In-person interventions reprojected: clinician tampon removal, supine positioning and the 000 Priority-1 call become AI recognise-and-instruct actions; IV fluids, clindamycin and anti-staphylococcal antibiotics are recorded as the correct hospital/paramedic pathway (necessity must_recommend) and are NOT prescribed or dosed by the AI Doctor.
No doses synthesised — the source note gives no drug doses; dose_route_frequency omitted for all medications.

Drug AMT/PBS candidate codes omitted (clindamycin, flucloxacillin, crystalloid) pending terminology lookup rather than guessing; only diagnosis and differential SNOMED/ICD candidates registered in codes_manifest, all unverified.

ingest.hashing: SHA-256 over canonical (JSON 2-space + trailing newline) bytes of each split node
